Article Title: João Félix: Fact check: Are João Félix and Marta Díaz secretly dating? Viral rumor debunked after reports of their Barcelona sighting
Article Text:
Fact check: Are João Félix and Marta Díaz secretly dating? Viral rumor debunked after reports of their Barcelona sighting (Image via Getty)

João Félix and Marta Díaz seen together in Barcelona as Javier de Hoyos and Marta Díaz respond to dating rumors





João Félix is again in the news, but this time not for football. The Portuguese star, who is now playing for Al Nassr, is being linked with Spanish influencer Marta Díaz. The rumors started in late March 2026 after people claimed they were seen together in Barcelona. Soon, social media picked it up, and the story spread fast. But now, both close sources and Marta Díaz herself have spoken clearly. As of March 25–26, 2026, there is no confirmed romantic relationship between João Félix and Marta Díaz. What people are seeing online is still just speculation, not fact.The whole story began when Javier de Hoyos shared a video on his TikTok channel. He said João Félix and Marta Díaz were seen together in Barcelona. In his words, “Exclusive! Marta Díaz and João Félix together? Ok, yes, they were together, but what is the real story? Why are you all going crazy sending me these stories?”He also explained how fans noticed a small detail. “A friend of Marta Díaz posted a story showing her wallpaper, and you noticed that next to it there was a bracelet you had already seen somewhere.Where? On João Félix’s wrist,” he said.This made people believe something more was going on. But Javier de Hoyos quickly added what he heard from people close to them. He said, “What people close to them told me is that they are friends, and very close friends, but there is nothing more than that, they are just friends.”After his video went viral, Marta Díaz herself replied in the comments. She clearly denied the dating rumors.Her exact words were: “The day the stars align and I have a boyfriend you will be one of the first to know. But as of today I only have friends.”This response is important because it directly comes from Marta Díaz. It shows that, right now, there is no romantic relationship.The rumors also gained attention because João Félix was earlier linked with Magui Corceiro. She has recently been connected with Formula 1 driver Lando Norris. That added more interest to João Félix’s personal life.Marta Díaz is one of Spain’s most popular influencers, with millions of followers on TikTok and Instagram. Because of her strong social media presence, even small updates quickly turn into big news.At this point, based on statements from Javier de Hoyos and Marta Díaz, the situation is clear. They have been seen together, but there is no confirmed relationship. Everything else is just online talk.
Article Summary: João Félix is being linked with Spanish influencer Marta Díaz. The rumors started in late March 2026 after people claimed they were seen together. As of March 25–26, 2026, there is no confirmed romantic relationship. What people are seeing online is still just speculation.

Article Title: Michal Kwiatkowski Crash: Champion cyclist Michal Kwiatkowski reveals crash scars in naked photo after hitting sign post during brutal collision with rival rider
Article Text:
Champion cyclist Michal Kwiatkowski reveals crash scars in naked photo after hitting sign post during brutal collision with rival rider (Image via Getty)

Michal Kwiatkowski reveals brutal crash injuries after Milan San Remo fall and explains pain behind “bruised not broken” update

Kwiato IG/Story





Michal Kwiatkowski shocked fans this week when he shared a raw and honest update after a scary crash during the Milan–San Remo race. The former world champion posted a photo on Instagram showing the real damage on his body after the fall. It was not about attention. It was his way of explaining how serious the injury really is. The crash happened late in the race, around 143 miles from the start. Michal Kwiatkowski collided with another rider and was thrown off his bike. He then slammed into a road sign on the side of the road. The impact looked bad, and many watching feared the worst. He was quickly taken to the hospital.A few days later, he told fans he had no broken bones. But that did not mean he was fine.His latest post showed painful cuts, swelling, and deep bruises across his hip, right leg, arm, and back. Along with the image, he wrote, “Day 4. Healing Up. Getting some range back in the right leg one day at a time.” This simple update gave a clearer picture than any race report could.After sharing the photo, Michal Kwiatkowski also explained what doctors found during his scans. His words were simple but powerful. He said, “If you wonder why I struggle to bend the leg, let me tell you what the MRI showed.”He then described the injury in detail:“My right quad suffered severe muscle fiber damage with massive swelling spreading over 30cm, alongside a deep intramuscular hematoma and huge post-traumatic fluid collections trapped in the fascias stretching up to 24cm.”Then he added a line that really stayed with fans:“I don’t know how a broken bone hurts, but this hurts like hell.”Earlier, from his hospital bed, he had already tried to calm people down by writing, “Bruised, not broken.” But now, with more details out, it is clear that the pain and recovery are far from easy.What stands out is how open he has been. Instead of hiding the injuries, he chose to show them and explain them in his own words. That helped fans understand that not all serious injuries come with broken bones.Even with all this, there is still a surprising twist. Michal Kwiatkowski is currently listed to compete in the Tour of the Basque Country, which starts on April 6. It is still unclear if he will be fully ready, but the fact that his name is there shows his mindset. For now, his focus is simple. Heal step by step. Get strength back in the leg. And slowly return to racing.
Article Summary: Champion cyclist Michal Kwiatkowski shared a raw and honest update after a scary crash during the Milan–San Remo race. The former world champion posted a photo on Instagram showing the real damage on his body after the fall. The crash happened late in the race, around 143 miles from the start.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding: Taylor Swift battles sleepless nights fearing her wedding with Travis Kelce could turn into a ‘circus’
Article Text:
Taylor Swift is reportedly battling sleepless nights as her wedding to Travis Kelce approaches. Leaked details and tight scheduling around his Kansas City Chiefs commitments have created mounting pressure. Concerned about losing privacy, she is even considering changing plans entirely, as the couple struggles to balance a dream ceremony with growing public attention.

Travis Kelce’s NFL schedule complicates Taylor Swift’s dream wedding plans





Fans thought that Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce 's wedding plans were going smoothly, but they are not anymore. What was supposed to be a well-planned, private party has turned into a lot of stress behind the scenes. It seems that some important details have leaked ahead of time, and the couple's close friends and family are working hard to keep the event private. The growing interest has changed the mood from excitement to urgency, making it necessary to have hard conversations about whether their original plans can still work.Sources suggest the stress has been building quietly. Taylor Swift, known for her precision and personal touch, is now dealing with something she dislikes most: unpredictability.As anticipation around the wedding grows, so does the fear that the ceremony could lose its intimacy and turn into a spectacle she never wanted."Taylor’s incredibly excited about marrying Travis, but the logistics of it all are causing her a ton of stress," a source exclusively revealed. That pressure appears to stem from more than just planning fatigue. "She’s someone who likes to control every detail and keep big moments private, so the fact that their timeline and all sorts of other details have already leaked out has really rattled her."The situation has reportedly escalated to the point where major changes are being considered. "she’s even floated the idea of changing their plans completely to throw everything off and avoid having it turn into a circus."Timing has only made things harder. Kelce’s return to the Kansas City Chiefs under a massive three-year deal has left the couple with little flexibility. "They have a very tight timeline because it all has to fit around Travis’ football schedule," the insider noted.Despite the chaos, Swift remains supportive. "Taylor totally supports him going back for another season, it’s what he loves, but it hasn’t made the wedding planning easy."For now, much of the responsibility sits with her. "Travis handed off most of the planning to Taylor because she has a real vision of what she wants. The downside of that is she’s getting very overwhelmed, to the point she’s having sleepless nights as a result."What began as a dream wedding is now a race against time, privacy, and pressure.
Article Summary: Taylor Swift is reportedly battling sleepless nights as her wedding to Travis Kelce approaches. Leaked details and tight scheduling around his Kansas City Chiefs commitments have created mounting pressure. Concerned about losing privacy, she is even considering changing plans entirely.

Article Title: Laura Loomer: Candace Owens fires back at Laura Loomer over George Farmer claim as viral arrest record claim sparks intense online backlash
Article Text:
Candace Owens fires back at Laura Loomer over George Farmer claim as viral arrest record claim sparks intense online backlash (Image via Getty)

Candace Owens strongly denies Laura Loomer’s claims about George Farmer as viral arrest record sparks debate

Watch Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle Candace Owens Questions Erika Kirk’s Past, Drops Kanye West Angle





Candace Owens found herself at the center of a fast-moving online fight after a serious claim about her husband, George Farmer, started spreading on social media. The claim came from Laura Loomer, who posted what she said was an arrest record and asked if it belonged to Farmer. Within hours, the post picked up attention, and people began arguing over whether the claim was real or misleading. Candace Owens quickly stepped in and rejected the accusation. She said the document being shared did not match her husband and accused Loomer of leaving out key details. The situation turned into a wider debate about how fast unverified claims can spread online and affect someone’s name.The issue began when Laura Loomer shared a document online and tagged Candace Owens directly.She asked if the record belonged to George Farmer, Owens’ husband. The post quickly gained traction, with thousands of views and comments.This was not the first time Loomer raised questions about someone with the same name. Earlier in 2025, she had pointed to a separate case in Tennessee involving a DUI with a similar name. That past mention added fuel to the latest claims, even though no clear link was confirmed.Owens responded soon after and pushed back hard. She wrote:“Hey Laura!No, it’s not. Which is why you cut out the eye color, skin color and hair color.”The main point of her response established that the document lacked essential information. She demonstrated that the missing key identifiers made the evidence base untrustworthy. The public shared her response widely while her supporters who backed her claimed that the post contained false information.The exchange developed into two separate social media reaction groups. Users described the claim as unreasonable because they believed it required evidence before making such serious accusations.The situation required additional examination before reaching a decision about its validity according to some individuals. People who wanted to remain neutral about the matter presented their doubts about the speed at which these allegations became widespread. Political commentators also joined the conversation. The majority of the participants described online disputes between public figures as more intense because these disputes usually develop into major public arguments.The investigation has not produced any authenticated evidence which connects the released document to George Farmer. The current situation presents two opposing claims that compete with each other while the accusation remains unverified.
Article Summary: Laura Loomer shared what she said was an arrest record and asked if it belonged to George Farmer. Within hours, the post picked up attention, and people began arguing over whether the claim was real or misleading. Candace Owens quickly stepped in and rejected the accusation. She said the document being shared did not match her husband.

Article Title: Gisele Bündchen: Gisele Bündchen finds ‘more meaningful’ life after Tom Brady as she moves on with Joaquim Valente
Article Text:
Gisele Bündchen has reportedly found deeper happiness after marrying Joaquim Valente in a private ceremony. Following her split from Tom Brady, she now embraces a peaceful, family-focused life in Florida. Sources say marriage feels “more meaningful,” with her prioritizing her children, wellness, and work on her own terms.

Gisele Bündchen finds deeper happiness after Tom Brady split and new marriage





Gisele Bündchen's life has become quieter and more grounded, and those closest to her say the change feels very deliberate. Months after privately tying the knot with Joaquim Valente, the supermodel is said to be embracing a slower rhythm built around family, wellness, and purpose. The change is not loud or flashy. Instead, it reflects a woman who has stepped away from constant spotlight pressure and chosen a life that feels calm and complete.Insiders describe this new chapter as more than just a marriage. It is a reset. After years of balancing global fame, motherhood, and a high-profile relationship, Bündchen appears to have found something steadier. Her days now revolve around her children, her partner, and a lifestyle that values presence over pace.According to PEOPLE, the wedding itself may have been private, but its emotional impact has been significant. "It [marriage] didn't change their day-to-day life in a big way, but it made things feel more meaningful," the source says of the couple."It was a very special moment for them to celebrate with close family and friends. They'll joke about it and say, 'Now we've been married for two months, now three months.' It's still new, but it already feels like they've built so much together in a short time."That sense of fulfillment extends beyond romance. "She's incredibly happy. Everything feels like it's come together," the source says. "The kids are thriving, and she's so grateful to be a mom again." Her home life in Florida now centers on simple joys."She's created a life that feels very peaceful. It's a slower, more intentional pace, and it's exactly what she wants. It's an amazing lifestyle for the whole family. It's very focused on wellness. They spend a lot of time outside. They love going for walks, paddleboarding and just being active together."While family remains her priority, Bündchen has not stepped away from her career entirely. "She still loves working, but it's on her terms now," the source says. "It has to fit into her life, not the other way around."Her journey to this place has not been without change. Gisele Bündchen’s previous marriage to Tom Brady lasted over a decade and brought two children into her life. The transition from that chapter to her present one has shaped her outlook. Today, her focus is clear. Stability, family, and a sense of meaning now define what success looks like.
Article Summary: Gisele Bündchen has reportedly found deeper happiness after marrying Joaquim Valente in a private ceremony. Sources say marriage feels “more meaningful,” with her prioritizing her children, wellness, and work on her own terms. After years of balancing global fame, motherhood, and a high-profile relationship, she appears to have found something steadier.

Article Title: Emma Bates: Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions
Article Text:
Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions (Image via Getty)

Emma Bates and UCan dispute over pregnancy claim brings back past issues faced by Alysia Montaño and Allyson Felix





Emma Bates has made a serious claim, and it has quickly caught attention across the running world. The American marathon runner said her longtime sponsor, UCan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. Bates, who is 33, shared this in a social media video on Tuesday, saying she has now been trying new energy gels after losing that deal. She had worked with the company for three years. But according to her, things changed right after she shared her pregnancy news. Bates had announced on March 5 that she and her partner, runner Steve Finley, are expecting a baby. What makes this even more surprising is that she had already run the Valencia Marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy, finishing with a time of 2:25:51.However, UCan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened.UCan said the decision to end its partnership with Emma Bates was made in September 2025, months before they knew about her pregnancy. In a statement, the company said this was part of normal business planning. They also said they offered her a new deal, but she chose not to accept it.Bates’ representative, Matt Sonnenfeldt from Flynn Sports Management, told Front Office Sports that talks continued even after September.He said the company made an offer in December and later changed it, which does not match UCan’s timeline.Emma Bates is one of the top long-distance runners in the United States. She finished second at the Chicago Marathon 2021 and placed eighth at the Boston Marathon last year. Her personal best of 2:23:18 ranks among the fastest in US history.She also works with Asics, which confirmed to Front Office Sports that her contract stays the same during her pregnancy. The company said it supports athletes through pregnancy and their return to racing.This situation has brought back memories of past cases. Runner Alysia Montaño once raced while eight months pregnant and later spoke out against Nike for not supporting her financially during that time. She later moved to Asics but said her pay was still reduced when her performance dropped.Olympian Allyson Felix also shared in a 2019 New York Times article that Nike wanted to cut her pay by 70 percent after she became a mother. She described it as a “terrifying time” while dealing with contract talks and a difficult pregnancy.After these stories became public, many companies reviewed how they treat female athletes during pregnancy. Now, Emma Bates’ case is again raising the same questions about support, fairness, and trust between athletes and sponsors.
Article Summary: US marathon runner Emma Bates said her longtime sponsor, UCan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. UCan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened. Bates had already run the Valencia Marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy, finishing with a time of 2:25:51.

Article Title: Vaibhav Sooryanshi turns 15: Now officially eligible, is India senior debut next?
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (ACC)

Watch Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag watches West Ham vs Man City in London Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag watches West Ham vs Man City in London

Is he now eligible to play for Senior Men's team?

Following his impressive IPL debut, Sooryavanshi was drafted into the India U19 setup, where he continued to deliver standout performances.

U19 World Cup 2026 (Player of the Tournament):

Vijay Hazare Trophy 2025-26:

Ranji Trophy 2025-26:

Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2025-26:

Rising Stars Asia Cup (Doha):





Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turns 15 today, celebrating his birthday just one day ahead of IPL 2026. Since his IPL debut, fans have consistently wondered when he will break into India’s senior men’s team. With him officially turning 15, just a day before the new IPL season begins, he is now eligible to feature in senior international cricket, as per ICC’s player eligibility regulations (Article 4).Sooryavanshi grabbed global attention with his stellar performances in his debut IPL season in 2025. He received a record-breaking bid of Rs 1.1 crore from Rajasthan Royals as a youngster and quickly justified the hype, proving why he is regarded as one of India’s brightest emerging talents.In just his second IPL match, he smashed a sensational 100 off 35 balls.His rise, however, began earlier, three years ago, when, as a 12-year-old, he was already dominating bowlers much older than him. Despite his form, he was unable to make his senior debut due to age restrictions. However, after his heroics in the U19 World Cup 2026, along with impressive performances in the Vijay Hazare Trophy 2025-26 and the Ranji Trophy 2025, and now with age on his side, he could soon be making headlines as a member of India’s senior men’s team.As per INTERNATIONAL CRICKET COUNCIL PLAYER ELIGIBILITY REGULATIONS ARTICLE 4, ELIGIBILITY ON THE BASIS OF AGE 4.1 states, "ARTICLE 4 ELIGIBILITY ON THE BASIS OF AGE, "A Player will only be eligible to represent a National Cricket Federation in an International Match (including ICC Events and U19 Events) if he/she is aged 15 or over on the relevant squad submission date (in the case of ICC Events including U19 Events) or on the date of the first match of the series/tournament to the played (in the case of all other International Matches). "After the introduction of ICC's regulations on Novermber 2020, the welfare and physical safety of minors participating in international cricket, including during travel, the ICC introduced a minimum age requirement of 15 years for all players competing in international matches at the U19 level and above, whether in ICC events or otherwise.Now that he has turned 15, he could be in contention for a senior India debut after the conclusion of IPL 2026. With the team currently undergoing a transition phase in Test cricket, selectors may keep a close eye on him, especially after his performances against England U19 in England. Looking ahead, with the build-up to the 2028 Olympics and T20 World Cup cycle, Sooryavanshi’s beast mode can be India's turnaround. Regarding the ODI debut, the selectors may not change the squad untill the 2027 World Cup which could be last for some of the senior players.Sooryavanshi led India to their sixth title, most notably smashing 175 runs off 80 balls (including 15 sixes) in the final against England.He became the youngest player to score a List A century at 14 years and 272 days. During a knock of 190 off 84 balls against Arunachal Pradesh, he broke AB de Villiers' record for the fastest 150 in List A cricket, reaching the milestone in just 59 balls.Named vice-captain of Bihar at age 14, he scored his maiden first-class fifty with a 67-ball 93 against Meghalaya, narrowly missing out on becoming the youngest Ranji centurion.He continued his white-ball dominance with an unbeaten 108 and a composed fifty (50 off 34 balls) against Maharashtra, showing improved maturity by pacing his innings.Representing India A, he recorded a "whirlwind" 144 off 42 balls against the UAE.
Article Summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turns 15 today, celebrating his birthday just one day ahead of IPL 2026. With him officially turning 15, just a day before the new IPL season begins, he is now eligible to feature in senior international cricket. He grabbed global attention with his stellar performances in his debutIPL season in 2025. He received a record-breaking bid of Rs 1.1 crore.

Article Title: When 13-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed a 157kph ball for straight six
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Everything is special about Vaibhav Suryavanshi: Vikram Rathour Everything is special about Vaibhav Suryavanshi: Vikram Rathour

The six that changed everything

From unknown to unmissable





A single shot in a trial session changed everything for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi — a fearless straight six off extreme pace that left seasoned scouts stunned and marked the arrival of a rare talent.Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turned 15 on March 27, 2026, and is now eligible for an India cap under updated ICC rules. Over the past two years, few young cricketers have generated as much buzz as the teenage prodigy, who has dominated age-group cricket and transitioned seamlessly into senior-level competition.His meteoric rise was underlined during the IPL mega auction in 2024 when Rajasthan Royals secured him for Rs 1.1 crore. The investment paid off almost instantly, as Sooryavanshi lit up IPL 2025 with fearless strokeplay, including a 35-ball century — making him the youngest T20 centurion and the second-fastest in IPL history after Chris Gayle But the origins of his stardom trace back to a trial session in Talegaon, Maharashtra, in 2024 — the day he announced himself in extraordinary fashion.Narrating the moment, Royals’ director of cricket Zubin Bharucha, speaking to The Cricket Monthly, recalled the disbelief that followed, revealing how he had urged the franchise to “put Rs 10 crore aside” ahead of the auction, convinced of the teenager’s rare talent.During the trial, Bharucha expected a conventional contest between a young batter and a left-arm quick. “The first ball to a right-hander had jagged back in… I’m thinking… the ball will probably move away and beat him outside off.”Instead, Sooryavanshi lofted it over extra cover for six. “I was like, ‘What am I seeing?’ I couldn’t even process it,” Bharucha admitted.What followed was even more remarkable. Facing sidearm throwdowns clocked at extreme pace (157-158 kmph), the youngster displayed composure beyond his years. “I told Vaibhav they’d be quick. He just said, ‘Haan sir, no problem.’”Then came the defining blow. “One of the sidearmers hit the deck hard, and Vaibhav hit it straight over the sightscreen for six… it measured 157 kph! That’s not normal. Not even for the best.”The Royals management needed little convincing after hearing Bharucha’s account. Though he had suggested setting aside Rs 10 crore, the franchise secured Sooryavanshi for a fraction of that amount.His IPL debut only reinforced the hype — a first-ball six and a record-breaking century at just 14 years and 32 days. Bharucha summed it up best: “You’re looking at something incredible… don’t miss this chance.”From a quiet village in Bihar to the biggest stage in T20 cricket, Sooryavanshi’s journey has been nothing short of extraordinary — and it all began with one audacious six off blistering pace.
Article Summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turned 15 on March 27, 2026, and is now eligible for an India cap under updated ICC rules. Over the past two years, few young cricketers have generated as much buzz as the teenage prodigy. His meteoric rise was underlined during the IPL mega auction in 2024 when Rajasthan Royals secured him for Rs 1.1 crore.

Article Title: Jaxon Smith-Njigba: Jaxon Smith-Njigba’s Seattle Seahawks tied to $17M Pittsburgh Steelers safety
Article Text:
Jaxon Smith-Njigba’s Seattle Seahawks tied to $17M Pittsburgh Steelers safety (Image via Getty: Pittsburgh Steelers logo and Seattle Seahawks logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Steelers safety DeShon Elliott linked to Jaxon Smith-Njigba ’s Seahawks

Deshon Elliott’s connection to Seattle head coach Mike Macdonald





As the 2026 NFL Draft nears with every passing day, so does the excitement for analysts who pitch trades to franchises in dire need of potential players and draft picks. At this time, Bleacher Report’s Moe Monton suggests the Seattle Seahawks could acquire Pittsburgh Steelers veteran safety DeShon Elliott to upgrade their safety position.The Seahawks lost safety Coby Bryant and cornerback Riq Woolen within two weeks of free agency. They did sign Indianapolis Colts safety Rodney Thomas II, but he has mostly played on special teams in the past two seasons. This is where Seattle GM John Schneider could bring in veteran insurance for the secondary in the form of DeShon Elliott.Pittsburgh signed two safeties, Jaquan Brisker and Darnell Savage Jr. This makes Monton predict that the Steelers may want to trade Elliott.Unless Jalen Ramsey moves into the slot full-time, then maybe Elliott could have a reduced role to play.The Sporting News’ Mike Moraitis reports that Elliott is ideal for Seattle because he is of starting-caliber, able to line up in the slot, in the box, or at free safety. However, Pittsburgh may not want to give up on its strong safety. They added Brisker and Savage, but Savage was brought in as depth rather than to be a starter.Suspicion further fueled when the Steelers added Jamel Dean to pair with Joey Porter Jr. They may send Ramsey back to the slot. And we’re back to square one.The thing is Elliott’s trade may depend on Ramsey’s position in 2026. If he stays a free safety, the safety room may seem overcrowded due to recent additions [Brisker and Savage]. An overcrowded room may mean Elliott’s departure/trade. But if the franchise decides to move Ramsey to his slot cornerback role, then Elliott may be kept for depth [all speculation at its best].But if Elliott is traded to Jaxon Smith-Njigba-led Seattle, someone will welcome him with a wide smile.The John Harbaugh-led Baltimore Ravens drafted Elliott in 2018. At the time, Mike Macdonald was the linebackers coach. Both of them have familiarity. A reunion in Seattle could be expected then.Since 2018, a lot has changed for both of them. Macdonald became a Super Bowl-winning head coach for Seattle within two years of starting his head coaching tenure. Whereas Elliott went on to accumulate impeccable numbers, the highest being in 2024: 108 tackles [73 solo], two forced fumbles, three fumble recoveries, and six pass breakups in 15 games.In 2025, the Texas alum played only five games due to a knee injury. In those five games, he amassed 38 total tackles [20 solo], 1.0 sack, one forced fumble, and two pass breakups.The 28-year-old safety suffered a season-ending hyperextension of the knee in Week 8 of 2025. Steelers GM Omar Khan gave Elliott’s injury update during the 2026 NFL Combine. “I’m looking forward to DeShon just being DeShon,” Khan said. “He’s really a good football player. And he’s working hard. Right now, everything’s on schedule, as far as I understand. And once we get to opening day, I don’t think there will be any limitations. ”Bleacher Report’s Moe Monton reports that Elliott is now healthy and could become a strong contributor to Seattle’s less crowded secondary. No Coby Bryant and Riq Woolen. Newly signed Rodney Thomas II has played mostly on special teams in the past two seasons.According to Spotrac, the Steelers safety signed a two-year, $12.5M contract with a $6M signing bonus and $7.1M in guaranteed money in June 2025. He is scheduled to earn a base salary of $2.04M and a $2.04M roster bonus, while carrying a $6.08M cap hit and a $6.04M dead cap value in 2026. His total career earnings over eight years are $17M.Would Pittsburgh trade Elliott? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Pittsburgh Steelers safety DeShon Elliott linked to Jaxon Smith-Njigba ’s Seahawks. Elliott is of starting-caliber, able to line up in the slot, in the box, or at free safety. Seattle lost safety Coby Bryant and cornerback Riq Woolen within two weeks of free agency.

ShnaggyHose (Image Via Getty)

ShnaggyHose alleges Cheesur “put his hands” on Kaelyn during livestream as heated exchange unfolds

Article Title: Tamil Nadu elections: Infra gaps, local issues put DMK on the back foot; AIADMK faces minority vote test in west
Article Text:
Watch EPS Rolls Out 297 Promises Ahead of Tamil Nadu Polls:‘Kula Vilakku Scheme’ On Focus EPS Rolls Out 297 Promises Ahead of Tamil Nadu Polls:‘Kula Vilakku Scheme’ On Focus





CHENNAI: Chennai’s western suburbs are like kabaddi courts this election, with a swift raid here or a strong tackle there capable of changing fortunes of the contestants in the four constituencies. Poonamallee is the only one that goes back half a century; the other three — Avadi, Ambattur, Maduravoyal — were carved out in 2011. Team AIADMK won the three seats and Poonamallee too in 2011 and 2016, but DMK’s raids proved too much for the opposition in 2021.As the teams return to the court this time, the question is whether DMK can retain its grip. DMK is yet to name its candidates, but AIADMK has retained only Maduravoyal.It has allotted Avadi to BJP, Ambattur to PMK and Poonamallee to AMMK. Some see this as a reflection of AIADMK’s weakened organisational base in a region it once dominated. AIADMK’s alliance with BJP in 2021 also appears to have hurt its prospects among minority voters, who are a significant number in some areas.Avadi has a history of electing leaders who went on to become ministers in both AIADMK and DMK govts — S Abdul Rahim, Mafoi K Pandiarajan and the sitting MLA, S M Nasar.There was speculation that AIADMK might renominate Abdul Rahim, but the constituency was handed to BJP. Pandiarajan, who lost in 2021, is now said to be shifting his focus to Virudhunagar.With Muslims and Christians making up nearly a fourth of the electorate, Nasar is expected to be renominated by DMK for a third term. A former district organiser of DMK youth wing led by M K Stalin, Nasar was briefly dropped from the cabinet in 2023 amid multiple complaints involving his family, and reinducted after a year.The western suburbs, which are a crucial link between the city’s northern and southern halves and a gateway to Tirupati and Bengaluru, have long been a neglected court. But there’s a boom in residential and industrial construction. In fact, realtors are positioning it as the “new south Chennai.”But civic infrastructure has lagged. There’s no piped water supply, stormwater drains are inadequate and underground sewage systems are incomplete. This has left a lot of people unhappy. DMK has promised big infrastructure projects, including the proposed Tamil Nadu Knowledge City at nearby Tiruvallur. Besides, metro rail is ready to connect Poonamallee and Porur with Vadapalani. And, has proposed extension from Tirumangalam to Pattabiram. The planned bus terminus at Kuthambakkam could make it the next Koyambedu.Yet, the spectators feel the defending champions could have done more. Residents of village panchayats such as Adayalampattu and Vanagaram remain outside Greater Chennai Corporation limits despite a GO mandating merger. The delay in merging Tiruverkadu and Poonamallee with Avadi has added to frustrations.DMK’s flanks are weak in Avadi, in particular. Despite being upgraded to a municipal corporation eight years ago, it has struggled to capitalise on that status. Large areas lack piped water supply, and an underground drainage project has seen little progress in the past five years. Even the widening of the Chennai-Tiruttani Highway has largely stayed on paper. Disgruntled spectators compare Nasar to guest player K Pandiarajan of AIADMK, who brought the Tidel Park to west Chennai apart from restoring the Paruthipattu lake.As for TVK and NTK, they have not so far made a mark in this region, but it’s early days yet. Leave them out of the equation for now and Chennai West could see the ruling side score big with its promised bigticket projects or falter as the opposition pins it down over unresolved local issues.
Article Summary: Poonamallee is the only one that goes back half a century. The other three — Avadi, Ambattur, Maduravoyal — were carved out in 2011. Team AIADMK won the three seats in 2011 and 2016, but DMK’s raids proved too much for the opposition in 2021.

Article Title: Minnesota Wild: NHL standings: Minnesota Wild close to their 100-point season as they are set to face the Florida Panthers amid tough Central Division race
Article Text:
Minnesota Wild to face Florida Panthers and the Stanley Cup Champion Matthew Tkachuk next (Image via AFP Photo)

Minnesota Wild set to lock horns with Florida Panthers, as they chase another 100-point season





The Minnesota Wild are chasing a 100-point season as they prepare to face the Florida Panthers in a key late-season matchup with playoff implications. Competing in the Central Division, Minnesota has managed to stay among the top teams in the NHL standings of 2025-26, and the team is now nearing its third 100-point season in the past five years. Earlier, the Wild locked horns with the Tampa Bay Lightning and faced a crushing defeat by 6-3.As a result, the Tampa Bay Lightning moved within two points of the Buffalo Sabres for first place in the Atlantic Division, as reported by the NHL. Meanwhile, the Florida Panthers will wrap up this week’s two-game homestand on Thursday night, and they will head to play home game No. 37 of 41 when they host the Minnesota Wild at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday.The Wild currently sits in third place in the Western Conference amid the tough Central Division race, while the Panthers are in the fifteenth spot. The Minnesota Wild are all set for a high-stakes inter-conference clash against the Florida Panthers as they continue to push toward a 100-point season in the closing stages of the regular campaign. The club enters the matchup with a strong record, and it sits among the top three teams in the Western Conference.With the playoffs approaching, the Wild are closing in on their third 100-point season in five years, underlining their consistency as a postseason contender.According to reports, in the 2021-22 season, the Wild scored 53 wins and 113 points. Subsequently, in 2022-23, they ended the season with 103 points. However, in 2024, the team saw a dip in points, as they closed with 87 points. They are currently on 92 points with 40-20-12, as per ESPN.As the season is winding down, the Panthers and their fans are keeping a close eye on the standings to see where they finish. In the past few years, Panthers fans were watching the standings to see how high the team would finish. But this year, the situation is different and worse.Announcing the same about the high-intensity match, NHL stated on their Twitter/X handle, “The @mnwild (40-20-12, 92 points) are closing in on their third 100-point season in a five-year span while competing in the ultra-competitive Central Division as they face two-time #StanleyCup champion Matthew Tkachuk and the @FlaPanthers.”The Florida Panthers are currently holding a 35-32-3 record, with 73 game points, placed just before the New York Rangers, who are out of the playoff race. Earlier, the Panthers made the playoffs for 7 straight years, but this year they will miss the playoffs, so that streak will end.This game will be important for both the team, as the Panthers are wrapping their series of home games, and want to gain confidence in good form before the playoffs begin. While the Wild will aim to edge closer to the 100-point milestone in the highly competitive Central Division race.
Article Summary: Minnesota Wild set to lock horns with Florida Panthers, as they chase another 100-point season. Wild currently sits in third place in the Western Conference amid the tough Central Division race, while the Panthers are in the fifteenth spot. Florida Panthers are currently holding a 35-32-3 record, with 73 game points, placed just before the New York Rangers, who are out of the playoff race.

Article Title: Jude Bellingham Injury: Jude Bellingham shares graphic surgery footage as Real Madrid star finally reveals years of painful shoulder dislocations
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham (Image Via Getty)

Jude Bellingham explains how injury started at Borussia Dortmund and why he delayed surgery for years





The story is not just about a footballer getting surgery. It is about how long he kept going despite pain. Jude Bellingham has finally opened up about a shoulder injury that troubled him for years. The Real Madrid midfielder shared a detailed video showing his surgery and recovery journey.He had been dealing with repeated shoulder dislocations since 2022. Still, he chose to delay surgery again and again. The reason was simple. He did not want to miss big tournaments and important matches. Now, after finally going through the operation in July 2025 in London, he has spoken honestly about the fear, pain, and the impact it had on his body.The problem began when Jude Bellingham was playing for Borussia Dortmund during the 2022–23 season. He dislocated his left shoulder for the first time. At that moment, he already knew surgery might be needed. But the England national football team World Cup campaign was coming soon, and he did not want to miss it.So he kept playing. Even after moving to Real Madrid, the issue did not go away. In fact, it got worse. He suffered more dislocations in 2023 and 2024.One of the worst moments came during a match against Rayo Vallecano, when his shoulder stayed out longer than usual.Talking about that moment, he said, “It stayed out for a while and I could not get it back in myself. It felt like an eternity before the physios got it back in. It was actually 90 seconds, but for me it felt like five or ten minutes. It was a horrible experience.”Even then, he chose to continue. He wore a brace under his shirt and adjusted his playing style. But that came with a cost. He explained, “Wearing the brace means other parts of my body have to compensate. I even had a point where I could not move because of pain in my back.”Finally, after years of managing the injury, he had surgery at Fortius Clinic on July 16, 2025. The video he shared shows real moments from before and during the operation.He admitted the mental side was just as tough. “I was really worried about everything that could go wrong. It is the most anxious I have been about anything,” he said.Now, his focus is simple. He wants to return stronger. “The thing I am most looking forward to is being able to play without a brace again,” he added.
Article Summary: Jude Bellingham has finally opened up about a shoulder injury that troubled him for years. The Real Madrid midfielder shared a detailed video showing his surgery and recovery journey. He had been dealing with repeated shoulder dislocations since 2022. Still, he chose to delay surgery again and again.

Article Title: Ishowspeed Birthday: IShowSpeed blushes after ex Vanessa’s flirty birthday donation goes viral
Article Text:
Image Via Instagram

IShowSpeed turns shy as ex Vanessa’s flirty birthday message goes viral

“Hey Speed it’s me Vanessa I know you miss me… you probably saw my TikTok so you know I’m in Miami hit my line I miss you too.”





The internet rapidly shifted its focus to IShowSpeed after this unexpected event occurred during his birthday stream on March 26, 2026. The popular streamer celebrated his 21st birthday and received a special form of donation that completely caught him off guard. What made this event even more interesting is that it was sent to him by his ex-girlfriend, Vanessa Anne Williams.As soon as this message was read aloud to everyone on the stream, Speed's reaction became the main event. The streamer began to turn red and started smiling, looking very shy about this event.The donation message from Vanessa was simple but very personal. It said,As soon as he heard this, Speed could not hide his reaction. He smiled, looked away, and kept blushing, showing that the message really affected him. Fans quickly noticed this and began talking about it online.This moment also reminded fans about their past relationship. Speed and Vanessa started dating in 2024 and were often seen together in streams and videos. She even surprised him during his 20th birthday in Argentina, which fans still remember.However, the couple broke up earlier in 2026 after being together for about two years. Speed had shared that he preferred a different type of relationship, while Vanessa wanted something more serious and committed.Because of this new message, many fans are now wondering if the two might get back together. Vanessa’s recent TikTok posts, which showed her in Miami, also added to this curiosity. Some fans think the message was playful, while others believe it could mean something more.Until then, nothing has been confirmed by Speed or Vanessa about their current relationship status. However, this small incident between the two has already generated a lot of buzz among the fans online. The fans will be waiting to see what new developments between the two in the coming days.
Article Summary: IShowSpeed received a birthday message from his ex-girlfriend, Vanessa Anne Williams. The message said, "Hey Speed it’s me Vanessa I know you miss me… you probably saw my TikTok so you know I’m in Miami hit my line I miss you too" Speed's reaction to the message became the main event on the stream.

Article Title: Paula Badosa Retirement: Is Paula Badosa retiring at 28? Injury struggles and ranking fall outside top 100 raise concern after emotional message
Article Text:
Is Paula Badosa retiring at 28? Injury struggles and ranking fall outside top 100 raise concern after emotional message (Image via Getty)

Paula Badosa opens up on mental struggle, injury pain, and life changes after ranking drop and Stefanos Tsitsipas split





Paula Badosa is going through a very hard time, and this time it is not just about tennis. The former world No. 2 player shared an emotional message after her ranking dropped outside the top 100. The 28-year-old Spanish star has been struggling with a long-term back injury, and now she is also dealing with mental pressure. After her early exit at the Miami Open, things got worse in the rankings, and her words have now raised serious concerns about her future in the sport.She had already paused her 2025 season in September to recover, but since coming back, wins have not come easily. Earlier this month, she played a lower-level Challenger event in Austin to rebuild confidence, winning three matches before losing in the semi-final.Then in Miami, she won her first match but lost badly in the next round to young American player Iva Jovic, 6-2, 6-1. Because she had reached the fourth round last year, this early loss cost her many ranking points.After the loss, Paula Badosa took to Instagram and shared how she really feels inside. Her words were raw and honest.She wrote, “Fear, that damn fear. It’s so awful. Sometimes I feel like I can’t control the voices inside me.The emotions are overwhelming, and I feel like I’m drowning. Doubts take hold, and I feel lost in a sea of emotions.”She also admitted that some days feel better than others. “There are days when I feel strong enough, and others when the mountain seems too high… and I wonder if I’ll be able to do it.”Still, she made it clear she is not giving up. “If anything defines me, it’s that I always bounce back. Turn pain into power, right? Why should this time be any different?”This comes after months of struggle with her back injury. She has already missed big tournaments in the past due to the same issue. Even when she plays, she is not fully fit, which has made things harder.Last month, she also responded strongly to a fan who questioned her commitment. She said, “You have no idea what it’s like to live with a chronic injury and still choose to keep going… I’m the first one suffering with pain and having endless nightmares to try to find solutions every single day.”Off the court, her life has also changed. Paula Badosa and Stefanos Tsitsipas ended their relationship around last year, which added more attention and pressure around her.Despite everything, she is trying to stay hopeful. “Paula isn’t back yet… but she will be,” she told her fans.
Article Summary: Former world No. 2 shared an emotional message after her ranking dropped outside the top 100. The 28-year-old Spanish star has been struggling with a long-term back injury, and now she is also dealing with mental pressure. After her early exit at the Miami Open, things got worse in the rankings.

Article Title: Uk Asylum Case: 'Always been gay': Migrant granted asylum in Britain over homosexuality left wife and child in Africa
Article Text:
'Always been gay'





A migrant who was granted asylum in Britain after saying he was gay has admitted he left behind a wife and child in his homeland of Cameroon.When 35-year-old Marius Kamna first travelled to Britain from Cameroon on a temporary visa to attend a United Nations climate change conference in Glasgow, few would have expected him to ask for asylum. Instead of contributing to discussions on environmental issues, he applied for refugee protection, saying he was gay. He later settled in Wales and got a job of a heavy goods vehicle mechanic.Kamna’s claim of homosexuality was accepted by the British asylum panel, and he was granted refugee status.However, he did not mention that he had a wife and son in Cameroon when he applied for asylum. It later came out that he knew about them at the time but chose not to tell the authorities.Thousands of asylum seekers have based their claims on their sexual orientation, and some cases may involve people exploiting the system.In Kamna’s case, the revelation of a wife might fit this pattern. But Kamna still says that his situation is more complex.Speaking to the Daily Mail in Cardiff, where he works, he explained that he has “always been gay” and that his marriage in Cameroon was an attempt to escape homophobia in his home country.Cameroon is known for its harsh treatment of the LGBTQ+ community, with discrimination, stigma, and legal penalties still common.Kamna at first described himself as bisexual. He later corrected that statement: “No, that’s not true, I am gay. That is the way I’ve been since I was 15 or 16.” Kamna said he spent years hiding his true identity.Kamna said his marriage was arranged in Cameroon to win back the respect of his parents, who had disowned him when they discovered his sexuality. “I got chased out of the house by my parents and to earn back their respect a marriage was arranged,” he said.He said he asked for forgiveness and even paid an official a bribe to complete the paperwork. Although he is gay, Kamna admitted he went through with the marriage, which led to the birth of his son, Emanuel, who is now seven.Even though he has not seen his son since leaving Cameroon, Kamna said he stays in touch by phone and sends money to his child’s mother to support him. Kamna added that when he was invited to the Glasgow conference, he saw a chance to stay in Britain legally and start a new life, even if it meant leaving his family behind.Kamna said that arguments with neighbours in his shared house led to the police being called, and he has now moved to a new home in Newport. He added that his current partner is a gay man from Africa, and he is happy living in Britain.“When you come here you have to do everything right because you don’t want to go back,” he said.
Article Summary: Marius Kamna, 35, travelled to Britain on a temporary visa to attend a UN climate change conference in Glasgow. He applied for refugee protection, saying he was gay. Kamna’s claim of homosexuality was accepted by the British asylum panel, and he was granted refugee status. However, he did not mention that he had a wife and son in Cameroon when he applied for asylum.

Article Title: D’Artagnan: 350-year mystery may be over: Archaeologists discover remains believed to be The Three Musketeers’ d’Artagnan’
Article Text:
Skeleton uncovered under Dutch church

The discovery that may solve a 350-year mystery

Who was d’Artagnan?

Charles de Batz de Castelmore, Count d’Artagnan, inspired The Three Musketeers



The battle that ended his life

Why the evidence is so compelling

DNA testing could confirm the truth

A legend between history and fiction





A remarkable archaeological discovery in the Dutch city of Maastricht may finally solve one of history’s most enduring mysteries. During restoration work at a historic church, researchers uncovered a high-status skeleton buried beneath the altar, an unusual and prestigious resting place. What makes the find extraordinary is the presence of a musket ball fragment lodged in the thigh and a 17th-century French coin, both of which closely align with historical records of Charles de Batz de Castelmore d’Artagnan. The legendary soldier, who inspired The Three Musketeers, was said to have died in Maastricht in 1673 from a similar wound.The remains were discovered inside St. Peter and Paul Church during ongoing restoration efforts, surprising archaeologists with their placement beneath the altar, typically reserved for individuals of high social or religious status.The excavation is being carried out by experts from RAAP Archaeological Consultancy in collaboration with local heritage authorities.“This is an exceptional find,” said Michel Groothedde, one of the lead researchers associated with the project. “Burials beneath church altars were rare and usually reserved for individuals of considerable importance. That immediately raised questions about the identity of this individual.”Alongside the skeleton, researchers found a French coin dating back to the 1600s, reinforcing the theory that the individual may have been a French military figure. However, the most compelling clue was the musket ball fragment embedded in the thigh bone, suggesting a fatal battlefield injury.Charles de Batz de Castelmore d’Artagnan was a Gascon nobleman who rose to become the captain of the Musketeers under Louis XIV. Known for his bravery and leadership, he became a key figure in French military history.Historian Olivier Poncet, who has studied the Musketeers extensively, noted, “D’Artagnan was not just a literary hero. He was a trusted military commander and close to the royal court, which makes it plausible that he would have received a burial of honour.”His legacy was later immortalised in literature by Alexandre Dumas, whose novel turned him into a symbol of loyalty, courage, and adventure.Historical records confirm that d’Artagnan died on June 25, 1673, during the siege of Maastricht in the Franco-Dutch War. He was reportedly leading French troops in an assault on the Tongersepoort gate when he suffered a fatal musket wound to the thigh.Military historian Julien Wilmart explained, “The injury described in historical accounts is highly specific. A musket shot to the thigh was not uncommon in siege warfare, but the fact that this skeleton shows a similar wound is particularly striking.”Contemporary accounts describe his death as heroic, but the exact location of his burial was never clearly documented, adding to the mystery that has persisted for over three centuries.The newly discovered skeleton matches several key details from historical accounts. The thigh injury aligns precisely with the documented cause of death. The French coin suggests the individual’s nationality, while the prestigious burial location hints at a person of significant importance.Archaeologist Liesbeth Claes noted, “Individually, these clues might not be conclusive. But taken together, they form a very compelling case that cannot be ignored.”Additionally, the proximity of the church to the site of the siege strengthens the theory that this could indeed be d’Artagnan.To move beyond speculation, scientists have begun DNA analysis on the remains. The research is being conducted in collaboration with forensic experts and geneticists, including teams linked to Maastricht University.“For a definitive identification, DNA is crucial,” said Maarten Larmuseau. “If we can match the genetic profile with known descendants of the d’Artagnan family, we could finally confirm his identity with a high degree of certainty.”The results will be compared with genetic samples from documented descendants, potentially bringing an end to a 350-year-old historical mystery.The story of d’Artagnan exists at the intersection of history and myth. While he was a real soldier, his legend was amplified by The Three Musketeers, where he appears alongside fictionalised companions like Athos, Porthos, and Aramis.Literary scholar Jean-Yves Tadié observed, “Dumas transformed a historical figure into a universal symbol of friendship and bravery. Discovering his real resting place would bridge literature and history in a powerful way.”The novel’s enduring popularity has ensured that his name remains synonymous with heroism and camaraderie.As DNA testing continues, historians and enthusiasts alike are watching closely. If confirmed, this discovery would not only locate the long-lost grave of d’Artagnan but also reconnect one of literature’s greatest heroes with his real historical resting place.
Article Summary: The remains were discovered beneath the altar of a Dutch church. A musket ball fragment lodged in the thigh suggests a fatal battlefield injury. A 17th-century French coin suggests the individual may have been a French military figure. DNA testing could finally confirm the identity of Charles de Batz de Castelmore d'Artagnan.

Article Title: China Dog Escape: Seven stolen dogs escape moving truck in China, travel 17 km together to return to their owners
Article Text:
Seven dogs break free from thieves and travel 17 km together to return to their village in China.







The video of seven dogs from different breeds traveling together, uncertain about where to go, stopping to see curious passersby, has been doing the rounds. As social media users ask Grok whether the video is real, the South China Morning Post reported that the seven dogs walking along a busy highway in Changchun, Jilin province, were spotted by a netizen surnamed Lu.According to a Chinese state-owned city Evening News which tracked down the owners of the dogs after the video went viral, the dogs did not break free from a truck and they neither traveled 17 km. All the dogs belonged to villagers who lived a few kilometers from the highway where they were filmed. The German shepherd had been in heat, which is why other dogs were drawn to it, the owners said, as reported by the CNN.Most dogs in the village were free-roaming and often disappeared for a day or two during their heat cycle, Cover News reported.The seven dogs in question have since returned home, with the German shepherd now restrained on a leash until its heat cycle ends.However, much before the Cover News's version, the version that went viral was that the dogs were stolen by thieves working for a dog meat shop and were whisked away in a truck. They escaped from the truck and returned home, traveling 17 km in two days.The group of dogs included a German Shepherd, which was injured, a Corgi, Golden Retreivers, Labradors and Pekinese dogs.“They resemble a band of little brothers in distress, moving in unison – nothing like stray dogs," Lu told Dahe Daily. Lu said he tried to help the dogs several times, wanted to guide them to safety, but the dogs kept on walking and ignored his attempts. Lu shared the video on Douyin, urging the authorities to step in.The dogs were seen wandering through nearby fields by some others, too, along the way. As their videos started going viral on Chinese social media, volunteers tracked their movement and ensured that they were home safely. Bitter Coffee Stray Dog Base told SCMP that the dogs are from the save village and they know each other as they often play together and that's why they remained in a pack for two days as they returned home.One volunteer claimed that individuals operating a dog meat shop had stolen the dogs, suggesting they may have escaped from a truck, though no witnesses saw their departure.Based on the timeline of the videos of them walking back home, it's believed that they escaped on March 16 and returned to their respective homes on March 18.In China, dog theft is considered a criminal offence, with penalties that can include fines or imprisonment based on the value of the animal.
Article Summary: Seven dogs from different breeds travel 17 km together to return to their village in Jilin province, China. Dog theft is a criminal offence in China, with penalties that can include fines or imprisonment based on the value of the animal. All the dogs belonged to villagers who lived a few kilometers from the highway where they were filmed.
